summary: Iteration 21: Invoice Image Upload Feature - All tests passed. Backend: 13/13 API tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified including image upload, thumbnail display, image viewer dialog, replace/remove actions, and print preview with attached image.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> inside <span> - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality (existing issue from previous iterations)

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login successful (ss@ssc.com)
Backend: GET /api/invoices returns image_url field for invoices
Backend: GET /api/invoices/images/{filename} serves existing image (200)
Backend: GET /api/invoices/images/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: POST /api/invoices/{id}/upload-image uploads image successfully
Backend: Uploaded image is accessible via GET /api/invoices/images/{filename}
Backend: Invoice record updated with correct image_url after upload
Backend: POST /api/invoices/{id}/upload-image rejects non-image files (400)
Backend: DELETE /api/invoices/{id}/image removes image from invoice
Backend: Invoice image_url is null after deletion
Backend: POST /api/invoices/{id}/upload-image returns 404 for non-existent invoice
Backend: DELETE /api/invoices/{id}/image returns 404 for non-existent invoice
Backend: Image replacement works - old image replaced with new image
Frontend: Invoices page loads with Img column in table
Frontend: Invoices without images show upload icon (dashed border) in Img column
Frontend: Clicking upload icon opens file picker
Frontend: After uploading, success toast 'Image uploaded to invoice' shown
Frontend: Thumbnail appears in Img column after upload
Frontend: Clicking thumbnail opens Image Viewer dialog
Frontend: Image Viewer shows full image preview
Frontend: Image Viewer has Replace button
Frontend: Image Viewer has Remove button
Frontend: Print Invoice dialog shows 'Attached Image / صورة مرفقة' section
Frontend: Print preview displays the attached image
critical_code_review_comments: Backend image upload endpoint properly validates file types (jpg, jpeg, png, webp, gif)
Images stored at /app/backend/uploads/invoices/ with unique filenames (invoice_id + uuid)
Image URL format: /api/invoices/images/{filename} - clean REST API
Invoice model has optional image_url field that gets populated on upload
Frontend properly displays upload icon (dashed border) for invoices without images
Frontend shows thumbnail (8x8 rounded) for invoices with images
Image Viewer dialog has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Print preview includes 'Attached Image' section with bilingual label (English/Arabic)
File input uses proper accept='image/*' attribute for better UX
seed_data_creation: Test image uploaded to INV-00009 during testing, then cleaned up by backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 complete. Invoice Image Upload feature fully tested and working. Backend: POST /api/invoices/{id}/upload-image, GET /api/invoices/images/{filename}, DELETE /api/invoices/{id}/image all working. Frontend: Upload icons shown for invoices without images, thumbnails for those with images. Image Viewer dialog allows viewing, replacing, and removing images. Print preview includes attached images at the bottom. React hydration warning in tables remains a cosmetic issue from previous iterations.
